title: After Hanshin J.F.: A View That Answers

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa…! That Buena Vista girl, she's every bit
as good as they said…!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, at this rate, next year's Tiara route…
Huh? Is she looking this way?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much!
I heard every bit of your support!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Next year, at the Oka Sho… I hope to see you
all again.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And when I do… I'll be waiting for the same
cheers as today!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A & B
text_block_list.text: Hey, just now, she was looking at me…!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A & B
text_block_list.text: …That was definitely meant for me!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A & B
text_block_list.text:
…Buena!!
Good luck on the Tiara route!!

Overcoming both the earlier trouble and the
pressure of a G1 stage, Buena Vista delivered
a stunning performance. One that completely
captured the crowd's hearts.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista, great race out there!
Those closing strides were incredible…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

Even in the post-race interview, she was met
with praise. But—

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
By the way, we've heard there was some
trouble before arriving at the track…?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Had you not made it in time, it would've been
a loss for the racing world. Trainer, how do you
respond to that?
choice_data_list: Of course, it's all my responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…!
Trainer—
choice_data_list: This time, I was saved by her strength.

text_block_list.text:
I admit I should've prepared for more
possibilities. Owning that mistake, I also spoke
about how remarkable Buena Vista was to race
through it all under these conditions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…Being carried by your runner, and sounding
proud of it, no less.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Um, excuse me.
You're the reporter who interviewed me
before, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You've always been looking out for my future…
Thank you so much for that.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah, y-yes…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That's why, there's something I'd really like
you to understand. That my trainer is an
amazing person, too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The reason I've been able to grow stronger,
is because my trainer has always been by my
side.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So much… really, so much.
Every single day, from early morning to late
at night… always there, thinking about me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That hasn't changed since long ago.
From my trainer, I learned what it means to
keep trying.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The one who understands me better than
anyone, the one who supports me…
Because my trainer is there, I can believe in
myself and run forward.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…We're connected by a deep trust,
the trainer I'm proud of!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Right?
choice_data_list: …No, she's the true example of hard work

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah!
You're doing it again…

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
…Haha. I see. My apologies.
So the two of you are bound by "trust," then.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
There's just something about these two…
They make a great team.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, seriously. No weaknesses to worry
about with Buena Vista. In that case…

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
A Triple Tiara might actually be within reach,
she could become the third in history…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…About what I said earlier,
during the interview…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I really meant every word, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're blushing.
…Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hey. Next up, it's finally time…
The Classic races begin.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The first race of the Tiara route,
the Oka Sho…!

The Oka Sho. Held over 1600 meters at
Hanshin Racecourse, just like today.
For Buena Vista, after this race—
choice_data_list: You can go into it with confidence.
You can go into it with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Next year… Let's keep growing.
Together. Okay?

With our sights set on next year's Oka Sho,
we renewed our resolve and began preparing
once more.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
She was incredible, wasn't she, Buena Vista…
—Buena's heading into the Tiara route next, right…?
—So that makes her the favorite, yeah…?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Buena, so it is you, after all.
The one who will be my…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
You have my thanks. For accepting the role
of trial. One that will lead me to that destined
stage.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let us begin.
The story in which I prove myself worthy of
sainthood.
